message:
feat(clipboard): add CopyQuery action, clipboard-fallback feature, and UI polish tests

Clipboard improvements:
- Add CopyQuery message handler to copy current search query to
  clipboard with toast feedback, completing the clipboard integration
  (copy snippet, copy path, copy content, copy query)
- Enable "clipboard-fallback" feature in ftui-extras for broader
  terminal compatibility when OSC52 is unavailable
- Remove now-unused command_exists() helper (replaced by ftui-extras
  Clipboard::auto detection chain)
- Fix import ordering in copy_to_clipboard (alphabetical)
- Minor toast formatting adjustment for consistency

UI polish tests (2noh9.6.3):
- Add render_80x24_no_panic: verify standard terminal renders without
  panic and shows "narrow" breakpoint label
- Add render_40x12_no_panic: verify extreme small terminal doesn't crash
- Additional render stress tests at various terminal dimensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
